description: Available document types the user can draft via the chat interface. Each entry maps to a template the assistant fills in through a guided conversation.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Two-way NDA where both parties share and protect confidential information.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Terms under which a provider offers a cloud/SaaS service to a customer.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Engagement for professional/consulting services with defined scope and fees.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Short-term trial of a product or service before a full commitment.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Governs how a processor handles personal data on behalf of a controller.
